name: Redline
description: Annotate elements in a running web app with visual feedback, then auto-fix the flagged issues in source code.
longDescription:
Two modes: `/redline setup` guides installation of the Chrome extension or Tauri plugin for annotation capture — activated via `Cmd+Option+Shift+A` hotkey. Supports click-to-select (high confidence), arrows, circles, boxes, freehand drawing, and text labels. Exports JSON with selectors, outerHTML, computed CSS (~40 curated properties), child hints, and base64 screenshots.

`/redline <filename>` classifies each annotation by confidence level (`select` → high, `arrow`/`circle`/`box`/`text` → medium, `freehand` → low), uses screenshot disambiguation for ambiguous targets, locates source components via selector tracing, then dispatches parallel fix agents per file. Ambiguous comments are flagged for clarification.
